headline.purpose: Page header titles, large section headers.

label.purpose: Uppercase eyebrows, KPI kickers, status chips.

serif.purpose: Italic accent inside page headers — sparingly.

mono.purpose: Tabular numerics, inline code, transcript bodies.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: iOS standard curve — state flips, hover/press.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Gentle settle — panel reveal, drawer rise.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one blue button per surface. Used for the primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { appearance: none; border: 1px solid #0052CC; background: #0052CC; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 6px 14px; height: 32px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.003em; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0747A6; border-color: #0747A6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF, 0 0 0 4px #0052CC; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default for any non-primary action. Bordered neutral.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { appearance: none; border: 1px solid #DFE1E6; background: #FFFFFF; color: #172B4D; padding: 6px 14px; height: 32px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.003em; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.06); border-color: #C1C7D0; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF, 0 0 0 4px #0052CC; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button for tertiary actions inside toolbars.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { appearance: none; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #42526E; padding: 6px 14px; height: 32px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.06); color: #172B4D; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Crisp opaque content surface. Lifts on hover. Never frosted.
components.html:
Engineering

Today's spend, in-flight work, and what's slipping.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #DFE1E6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px 26px; box-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.08), 0 0 1px rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.10); transition: border-color 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #C1C7D0; box-shadow: 0 3px 5px rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.12), 0 0 1px rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.12); } .ds-card__title { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: #172B4D; } .ds-card__sub { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; color: #42526E; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input with accent halo focus.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 7px 10px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #C1C7D0; background: #FFFFFF; color: #172B4D; outline: none; transition: border-color 100ms ease, box-shadow 100ms ease; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8993A4; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0052CC; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 82, 204, 0.12); }

components.name: Status Chip — In Progress
components.description: Workflow status chip. Blue tint reuses the brand accent for the in-progress state.
components.css: .ds-status { font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-status--progress { background: rgba(0, 82, 204, 0.12); color: #0747A6; }

components.name: KPI Tile
components.description: Signature numeric metric tile. Tonal accent strip tints the surface without competing with the value typography.
components.html: Tokens today128,402↑ 12% vs. last week
components.css: .ds-kpi { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 16px 18px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #DFE1E6; border-radius: 6px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0052CC; } .ds-kpi--blue::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, currentColor 0%, transparent 60%); opacity: 0.06; } .ds-kpi > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; color: #172B4D; } .ds-kpi__kicker { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #5E6C84; } .ds-kpi__value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-kpi__sub { font-size: 12px; color: #42526E; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-kpi__trend--up { color: #006644; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Sidebar Item (Active)
components.description: Active sidebar route. Blue-tinted wash plus a 3px inset accent rail on the left edge.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #42526E; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: background 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.06); color: #172B4D; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(0, 82, 204, 0.10); color: #0747A6; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 4px; bottom: 4px; width: 3px; border-radius: 999px; background: #0052CC; }

components.name: Glass Bar
components.description: Sticky frosted header strip that floats over scrolling content. The signature iOS look.
components.css: .ds-glass-bar { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(9, 30, 66, 0.08); backdrop-filter: saturate(140%) blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(140%) blur(20px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8) inset, 0 1px 1px rgba(9,30,66,0.06), 0 12px 24px -8px rgba(9,30,66,0.14); font-family: 'Geist', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-glass-bar__title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.012em; color: #172B4D; margin-right: auto; } .ds-glass-bar__cta { appearance: none; border: 1px solid #0052CC; background: #0052CC; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 4px 10px; height: 28px; border-radius: 4px; font: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease; } .ds-glass-bar__cta:hover { background: #0747A6; } @supports not ((backdrop-filter: blur(0)) or (-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(0))) { .ds-glass-bar { background: #FFFFFF; } }

narrative.overview: Crawfish sits at the intersection of Jira's task density, Workday's calm neutrality, and iOS's frosted depth — and looks like none of them individually. It is the workplace for an organization where agents are first-class employees, so it reads as a working tool, not a marketing site. Information density is generous; chrome is quiet; the single brand blue carries identity without fighting for attention. The system is built on four ideas, applied in order: a single blue plus calibrated color, glass for chrome and opaque for content, typography with a point of view (Geist + Geist Mono + Instrument Serif), and 4px rhythm ruthlessly.
keyCharacteristics: Dense but calm. Information-first; chrome never competes with content.
One blue, used sparingly. Secondary hues never become surfaces.
Glass floats over content. Opaque surfaces hold content.
iOS settles, not Material bounces. Functional motion only.
Geist + Geist Mono + Instrument Serif. Closed set — no third family.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: One primary action per surface, ever. The Atlassian blue is the loudest color on the page; if a second blue button appears, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Brand-vs-State Rule
rules.body: The extended palette (sky / cyan / violet / mint / amber / pink / slate) decorates. The semantic palette (success / warning / danger) communicates state. Mint is never the success color; amber is never the warning color. Status carries text in addition to color.

rules.name: The Workflow Cools Rule
rules.body: Workflow positions ("done", "in review") use cool status palette entries (sky-blue for done, violet for review) — never green or red. Green and red are reserved for state semantics.

rules.name: The Closed-Set Rule
rules.body: Three families: Geist, Geist Mono, Instrument Serif. A fourth family is forbidden.

rules.name: The Tabular Numerics Rule
rules.body: Every numeric column in tables, every KPI value, every token-bucket count uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Misaligned digits are forbidden.

rules.name: The Serif-Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Instrument Serif appears at most once per page, in italic, as an editorial accent inside a sans page header. Never as running copy. Never upright.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-Chrome Rule
rules.body: Frosted glass applies only to floating chrome — sticky route headers, command palettes, modal headers, drawers, tooltips. Content surfaces are crisp opaque. Glass is never stacked on glass.

rules.name: The Soft-Settle Rule
rules.body: Card hover lifts shadow sm → md over 120ms. No bounces, no elastic easings on functional controls. iOS settle curves only.

dos: Do use a single blue (#0052CC light / #4C9AFF dark) for the one primary action per surface.
Do route every color, spacing, radius, and shadow through a --cf-* token. Reference variables by name, never raw hex.
Do float chrome on glass (.cf-glass, .cf-glass-bar). Keep content cards crisp opaque.
Do ship a @supports not (backdrop-filter) fallback for every glass surface.
Do use tabular numerics on every numeric column, KPI value, and token-bucket display.
Do keep buttons within a cluster at the same height.
Do truncate user-supplied strings with .cf-truncate — never wrap a multi-line title in a list item.
Do carry the active-state signal in two channels: background wash plus a 3px inset rail on sidebar items. Color is never the only signal.
Do import shared primitives from @crawfish/ui — never copy a component into a submodule.
donts: Don't apply backdrop-filter to a content card. Glass is for chrome only.
Don't stack glass on glass. One frosted layer at a time.
Don't use purple-to-blue marketing gradients, animated blobs, or glassmorphism as decoration.
Don't use the hero-metric SaaS template.
Don't introduce a fourth font family. Geist + Geist Mono + Instrument Serif is the closed set.
Don't use Instrument Serif as running copy, upright, or more than once per page.
Don't use green as a workflow color. Workflow positions use cool palette entries.
Don't use mint as the success color or amber as the warning color.
Don't add a new color outside the extended palette without writing it in DESIGN.md first.
Don't use magic numbers for spacing, radius, or shadow. 18, 22, 26 are forbidden — not on the 4px grid.
Don't use bouncing or elastic cubic-bezier on functional controls. iOS settles only.
Don't use emoji in product icons. Use the inline SVG <Icon> set.
Don't import from crawfish-dash into crawfish-lens or vice versa.
Don't use a border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text. Solid color, with emphasis through weight and size.
Don't use an em dash in product copy.
